cookbook.name: adaptive-customer-support
cookbook.title: Adaptive Customer Support
cookbook.blurb: runTeam() selects only the relevant specialists for a shipping or billing escalation, then synthesizes a grounded customer response.

cookbook.name: competitive-monitoring
cookbook.title: Competitive Monitoring
cookbook.blurb: Parallel source monitoring (Twitter/Reddit/News), contradiction detection, and aggregated intelligence reporting.

cookbook.name: contract-review-dag
cookbook.title: Contract Review DAG
cookbook.blurb: 4-task DAG (extract → compliance-check + summary → notify) with step-level retry. Run normally or with FORCE_FAIL=task2 to exercise retry.

cookbook.name: incident-postmortem-dag
cookbook.title: Incident Postmortem DAG
cookbook.blurb: 5-task DAG with three parallel root tasks (log patterns + deploy correlation + blast radius) feeding root-cause hypothesis and final postmortem synthesis.

cookbook.name: meeting-summarizer
cookbook.title: Meeting Summarizer
cookbook.blurb: Fan-out post-processing of a transcript into summary, structured action items, and sentiment.

cookbook.name: narrative-puzzle-hint-arbitration
cookbook.title: Narrative Puzzle Hint Arbitration
cookbook.blurb: Multi-source hint arbitration with an external safety veto that sits outside the generation loop.

cookbook.name: paper-replication-triage
cookbook.title: Paper Replication Triage
cookbook.blurb: Multi-source paper replication triage with artifact discovery, seeded conflicts, and a structured go/no-go plan.

cookbook.name: personalized-interview-simulator
cookbook.title: Personalized Interview Simulator
cookbook.blurb: Interactive interviewer loop with observer flags, shared memory, and structured debrief.

cookbook.name: rare-disease-information-triage
cookbook.title: Rare Disease Information Triage
cookbook.blurb: Source-isolated rare disease information triage with mock fixtures, seeded misinformation/conflict detection, and safety-boundary arbitration.

cookbook.name: translation-backtranslation
cookbook.title: Translation Backtranslation
cookbook.blurb: Translate → back-translate with a different provider → flag semantic drift (cross-model).

apps.name: express-customer-support
apps.title: Express Customer Support
apps.blurb: Express REST API: runTasks() behind POST /tickets, per-agent Zod schemas, swappable provider env vars, HTTP error mapping (400/502/504)

apps.name: with-vercel-ai-sdk
apps.title: Vercel AI SDK
apps.blurb: Next.js: OMA runTeam() plus AI SDK useChat streaming

reference.name: external-agent-acp
reference.title: External Agent Acp
reference.blurb: External coding agents over ACP (Agent Client Protocol)

reference.name: external-agent-process
reference.title: External Agent Process
reference.blurb: Generic local processes as external agents.

reference.name: mcp-bilig-workpaper
reference.title: MCP Bilig Workpaper
reference.blurb: Bilig WorkPaper MCP tools for formula readback, recalculation, and persisted workbook JSON.

reference.name: mcp-github
reference.title: MCP GitHub
reference.blurb: An MCP server's tools exposed to an agent via connectMCPTools().

reference.name: mcp-open-design
reference.title: MCP Open Design
reference.blurb: Batch fan-out over an MCP server's async jobs: N Open Design runs generated in parallel via runTasks(), each polling get_run to completion with code-driven orchestration.

reference.name: trace-observability
reference.title: Trace Observability
reference.blurb: onTrace spans for LLM calls, tools, and tasks.

vendor.name: observability-v2
vendor.title: Observability V2
vendor.blurb: No-key runnable v2 batching, InMemory/File TraceStore, OTel in-memory provider, CLI, SIGTERM server, and FaaS lifecycle examples.

vendor.name: with-tencentdb-memory
vendor.title: TencentDB Memory
vendor.blurb: TencentDB-Agent-Memory long-term memory (L0→L3 pipeline) via its Hermes Gateway sidecar.

basics.name: multi-model-team
basics.title: Multi Model Team
basics.blurb: Different models per agent in one team.

basics.name: single-agent
basics.title: Single Agent
basics.blurb: One agent with bash + file tools, then streaming via the Agent class.

basics.name: task-pipeline
basics.title: Task Pipeline
basics.blurb: runTasks() with explicit task DAG and dependencies.

basics.name: team-collaboration
basics.title: Team Collaboration
basics.blurb: runTeam() coordinator pattern — goal in, results out.

patterns.name: consensus
patterns.title: Consensus
patterns.blurb: Proposer→judge refutation loop via runConsensus(): default judge prompt and per-judge judgePrompt function.

patterns.name: cost-tiered-pipeline
patterns.title: Cost Tiered Pipeline
patterns.blurb: Run the same four-stage pipeline twice to compare flagship vs tiered model cost.

patterns.name: cross-provider-reasoning
patterns.title: Cross Provider Reasoning
patterns.blurb: Preserve a reasoning model's thought stream across providers via preserveReasoningAsText.

patterns.name: multi-perspective-code-review
patterns.title: Multi Perspective Code Review
patterns.blurb: Multiple reviewer agents in parallel, then synthesis.

patterns.name: plan-replay
patterns.title: Plan Replay
patterns.blurb: Pin a coordinator plan with createPlanArtifact, then replay it with runFromPlan, no coordinator re-run.

patterns.name: research-aggregation
patterns.title: Research Aggregation
patterns.blurb: Multi-source research collated by a synthesis agent.

patterns.name: risk-gated-bash
patterns.title: Risk Gated Bash
patterns.blurb: Per-call onToolCall gate + classifyBashCommand: auto-pass read-only bash, human-review ambiguous, block destructive.

patterns.name: structured-output
patterns.title: Structured Output
patterns.blurb: Zod-validated JSON output from an agent.

providers.name: local-quantized
providers.title: Local Quantized
providers.blurb: Quantized MoE on vLLM / llama-server with tuned sampling (topK / minP / frequencyPenalty / parallelToolCalls / extraBody.repetition_penalty)
